_comment: Registry of sources, shared by every evidence record. `tier` is the priority when sources disagree (lower wins). A source's authority does not by itself set how confident a fact may be — that ceiling is on each evidence version, because the same source can be read well or badly.

src-naver-place.name: Naver Place
src-naver-place.note: Korea's dominant business directory; operators maintain their own listings. Read through Naver's official search API.

src-kakao-map.name: Kakao Map
src-kakao-map.note: Second map service, used to cross-check Naver. Also supplies walking routes. Read through Kakao's official API.

src-itour-incheon.name: Incheon Metropolitan City — Incheon Tour
src-itour-incheon.note: The city's own tourism listing. Authoritative and independent of the venue, but curated and liable to go stale.

src-diningcode.name: DiningCode
src-diningcode.note: Third-party aggregator over other listings. Useful for per-day hours, but a step removed from the operator.

src-sportsseoul.name: Sports Seoul
src-sportsseoul.note: Press. Cited only for the documented history of the Gonghwachun trademark dispute, not for operating details.

src-naver-encyc.name: Naver Encyclopedia (지식백과)
src-naver-encyc.note: Reference work aggregating published encyclopedias. Cited for heritage designations.
